name: ddd-workshop
description: DDD learning-friendly workshop — rebuild that treats domain understanding itself as the primary artifact, not a downstream deliverable. First skill domain-storytime: a 1:1 learning session that walks through unfamiliar domains via actor-by-actor time-ordered narratives. Takes RFP/requirements docs/research as input, runs persona-perspective chapter-sized stories + 'why does this exist?' explanations + interactive question turns + confidence tags ([확실/일반론/추측]) marking validation hotspots. Artifact persistence is optional — comprehension is the goal, not the deliverable. Previous 7-skill pipeline preserved at ddd-workshop-tmp for reference during the rebuild.
